name: Worthington Enterprises, Inc.
description: Worthington Enterprises, Inc. is a market-leading industrial manufacturing company headquartered in the United States. The company operates through two primary business segments: Building Products and Consumer Products. It specializes in designing and manufacturing innovative solutions for commercial and residential construction markets, as well as tools, outdoor living, and celebrations end markets. Guided by a philosophy that prioritizes people, Worthington Enterprises leverages deep technical expertise and a commitment to quality to deliver value to its customers, partners, and shareholders while maintaining a strong focus on sustainability and ethical business practices.
